context: Fix broken links in the README 'Learn More' section: convert a relative DASHBOARD.md link to an absolute GitHub URL and remove a 404 conference talk link

checklist.name: dashboard_link_uses_absolute_url
checklist.description: The link to the dashboard documentation is changed from a relative path to an absolute URL that resolves correctly outside the repository context

checklist.name: broken_conference_talk_link_removed
checklist.example: Removed: `- [Back to the Future of Software](https://speaking.jbaru.ch/DVCzoZ/back-to-the-future-of-software-how-to-survive-ai-with-intent-integrity-chain) - Conference talk on IIC`
checklist.description: The broken link to the conference talk (speaking.jbaru.ch URL that returns 404) is removed from the README

checklist.name: other_links_preserved
checklist.example: Ground truth preserves `[GitHub Spec-Kit](https://github.com/github/spec-kit)` and `[Intent Integrity Chain explained](https://github.com/jbaruch/intent-integrity-chain)` links untouched
checklist.description: All other links in the 'Learn More' section remain unchanged (GitHub Spec-Kit link, Intent Integrity Chain explained link)

checklist.name: no_unrelated_changes
checklist.example: Ground truth modifies only: README.md (Learn More section)
checklist.description: Solution does not modify files or components outside the scope of the task
